name: Broccoli Ramekins with Hollandaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients for the ramekins and whisk until blended. Pour into two large buttered custard cups, filling them 3/4 full. Place on a rack in a pan with water so that it reaches halfway up the sides of the cups.
2. Bake at 325°F for 20 minutes or until an inserted knife comes out clean. The timbales can be made ahead and reheated. Turn off heat, then turn out onto a heated plate. Garnish with Hollandaise.
Hollandaise Sauce:
1. Whisk egg yolk, cream, and lemon juice over moderate heat for about one minute or until the sauce just begins to thicken. Remove from heat and whisk in butter. Return to heat for a moment to thicken further, whisking vigorously. Season with salt and cayenne. The sauce can be made ahead of time and reheated in a microwave oven or over warm water; however, if ingredients are assembled, it can be made easily at the last minute.
